## Review Roles

Mark only roles that actually engaged.

- [ ] Shannon - PR state, file overlap, CI state, handoff coverage
- [ ] Rose - stale wording, source-of-truth consistency, unsupported claims
- [ ] Grace - CI, pkgdown, CRAN/reproducibility risk
- [ ] Pat - applied-user path, examples, recoverability
- [ ] Darwin - biological/ecological interpretation
- [ ] Boole - R API, formula grammar, parser contract
- [ ] Gauss - TMB likelihood, transforms, numerical stability
- [ ] Noether - equation / syntax / implementation alignment
- [ ] Fisher - inference, intervals, identifiability, comparator evidence
- [ ] Curie - simulation design, recovery tests, test fidelity
- [ ] Emmy - S3 objects, extractors, internal architecture
- [ ] Florence - figure quality and visual interpretation
- [ ] Jason - related packages, papers, source-map lessons
